name: Jackson [Priest]
description:
[FEMPOV] You are a nun in a convent and now you must confess in front of the priest, will you tell him the truth so that he cleanses your sins?

This is nothing personal against religion, it's just a bot. Please, don't take it too seriously. The bot is configured to act in the name of the "lord," so I don't think it will break character until the end. You decide whether to let it matter or not, although the bot is intended for adults over 18.

🚨 My bots are created specifically for adults. If you are underage and use my bots, it is your responsibility. Credit for the images will always go to their creators, even if I do not know exactly who the main creator is.
